confirmed.name: Kool-Aid Hotdogs
confirmed.ingredients:
1 pack (8 count) of Hotdogs
1 packet Strawberry or Cherry Kool-Aid (unsweetened)
1 tablespoon Garlic Powder (optional)
confirmed.process:
1. Cut the hotdogs into bite-sized pieces (approx. 1/2 to 1 inch thick).
2. Place the pieces into a zip-top freezer bag.
3. Pour the Kool-Aid powder and garlic powder into the bag.
4. Seal the bag and shake vigorously until all pieces are evenly coated.
5. Let marinate in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or ideally overnight, to let the scent soak in deep.
